.2973H0.457556V7.29793ZM10.7209%2017.7467H16.4723C16.9953%2017.7467%2017.4529%2018.1288%2017.4529%2018.6386C17.4529%2019.0843%2017.126%2019.5312%2016.669%2019.594H4.96756C4.57596%2019.594%204.18373%2019.3401%204.05361%2018.9573C3.92224%2018.5745%204.05361%2018.1295%204.37921%2017.9384C4.57204%2017.8084%204.80044%2017.7414%205.03293%2017.7467C6.92933%2017.6826%208.8251%2017.7467%2010.7202%2017.7467H10.7209Z'%20fill='%23FFC507'/%3e%3cpath%20d='M10.7203%202.45459C11.0641%202.46213%2011.3928%202.59916%2011.6355%202.83739L11.7015%202.9015C12.2244%203.53762%2012.0283%204.30322%2011.1779%204.87585C11.4394%205.38562%2011.7008%205.89539%2012.0277%206.34168C12.8115%207.74339%2013.596%209.1451%2014.3811%2010.4821C14.5778%2010.802%2014.7079%2010.8649%2014.97%2010.6738C16.2115%209.97293%2017.3875%209.20859%2018.6296%208.5071L18.8257%208.38013C18.5642%208.18968%2018.4341%207.87099%2018.3687%207.5523C18.3027%206.85082%2018.8911%206.27756%2019.5448%206.21345C20.1344%206.15059%2020.6574%206.53213%2020.8522%207.10602C20.8522%207.1695%2020.9176%207.23362%2020.9176%207.29773V7.74339C20.7215%208.38013%2020.2639%208.76168%2019.5448%208.76168C19.5448%208.82705%2019.4794%208.8899%2019.4794%209.0175L17.3222%2016.153C17.2574%2016.4717%2017.1267%2016.5358%2016.7992%2016.5358H10.7203V2.45459ZM10.7203%2017.7465H16.4723C16.9953%2017.7465%2017.4529%2018.1286%2017.4529%2018.6384C17.4529%2019.0841%2017.126%2019.531%2016.6691%2019.5938H10.7869L10.7203%2017.7458V17.7465Z'%20fill='%23FFB200'/%3e%3cpath%20d='M8.84149%2013.7991H10.1407V9.97484H9.04578V9.23124C9.60709%209.1225%2010.0754%208.95341%2010.4513%208.72461H11.3419V13.7991H12.4778V14.7715H8.84149V13.7991Z'%20fill='white'/%3e%3c/svg%3e)

The Universal Document Parsing Solution

The Universal Document Parsing Solution

Accurate Parsing, Efficient Extraction: Turn documents into actionable, AI-ready data

Try OnlineTry Online

Full Format Support

Handle all major formats: PDF, Word, PPT, Images, and more

Intuitive import via drag-and-drop, screenshot, or batch upload

Batch & Concurrent Processing

Rapid Output for Multiple Scenarios

Seamless Workflow Integration

Lossless Extraction of Complex Elements

### Advanced Table Recognition

*   Accurately parse complex tables with rotations, cross-page cells, and merged cells
*   Export with high fidelity to CSV, HTML, Markdown, and other formats

![preview](https://webpub.shlab.tech/dps/mineru/mineru-site-fe/mineru-site-prod.53/assets/extract-section-1-Z6D7RZnr.png)

### Precise Formula Recognition

*   Accurately identify long, multi-line, and intricate formulas
*   Output to LaTeX/MathML for seamless editing and reuse

![preview](https://webpub.shlab.tech/dps/mineru/mineru-site-fe/mineru-site-prod.53/assets/extract-section-2-C62wPnLq.png)

### Chemical Paper Analysis

[Accelerate chemical research with A4Chemistry. Let's collaborate.](https://mineru.net/community-portal/?aliasId=e64aa2f5)

### Molecular Detection & Recognition

*   Accurate Molecular Detection
*   SOTA Structure Recognition
*   Precise Atom & Bond Mapping

### Chemical Reaction Extraction

*   Precise Reaction Analysis
*   Identify Reactants & Conditions

### Global Molecular Association

*   Cross-Media ID Extraction
*   SOTA Global Association
*   Molecule-Text Data Generation

![preview](https://webpub.shlab.tech/dps/mineru/mineru-site-fe/mineru-site-prod.53/assets/globalassoc-jsbyKdhi.png)

Define the next generation of extraction tool form with MinerU

Build an open extraction ecosystem and open a new era of document extraction

Learn MoreLearn More

![github-section-logo](https://webpub.shlab.tech/dps/mineru/mineru-site-fe/mineru-site-prod.53/assets/github-section-logo-tpwicDAO.svg)

![Description](https://webpub.shlab.tech/dps/mineru/mineru-site-fe/mineru-site-prod.53/assets/logo-CF_69mGL.svg)

# MinerU4Chem二维码 

二维码已通过安全验证
